upcoming.title: Winemaker's Dinner: Provence
upcoming.description: Join us for an evening celebrating the wines of Provence, paired with a special five-course menu crafted by our chef.

upcoming.title: Olive Oil Tasting
upcoming.description: Explore single-origin olive oils from Spain, Italy, and Greece. Light bites and wine included.

upcoming.title: Spring Equinox Dinner
upcoming.description: A celebration of spring's first harvest with a seasonal tasting menu highlighting the best of early spring produce.

privateDining.description: Our private dining room accommodates up to 24 guests, offering an intimate setting for celebrations, corporate gatherings, or simply an evening with those who matter most.
